case_title: DIANA HALTERMAN VS. HSBC BANK USA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT HSBC BANK USA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-02-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HSBC BANK USA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT HSBC BANK USA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-11-2013 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO FEB-15-2013 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY VANDANA KATJU--EMPLOYEE HSBC BANK. PLAINTIFF DID NOT STIPULATE FOR PRO TEM JUDGE TO HEAR THIS CASE TODAY. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY HALTERMAN, DIANA AS TO DEFENDANT HSBC BANK USA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-11-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-15-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-15-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY VANDANA KATJU--VICE PRESIDENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE, PER PLAINTIFF. "DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY PLAINTIFF $155.90 TO SETTLE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HALTERMAN, DIANA AS TO DEFENDANT HSBC BANK USA
